title: Salmia incisa

The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate various conditions such as fever, cough, and skin disorders. Traditionally, Salmia incisa is used in herbal preparations such as tea, infusions, and tinctures to promote well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health issues.
